proposition: The Demerzel governance framework is structurally complete with all constitutional, policy, and schema artifacts intact

supporting.claim: All 4 constitutions, 11 policies, 14 personas, 9 schemas, 13 test suites verified present and versioned

Framework expanded significantly since initial assessment: 24 policies (was 11), 18 grammars, 23 courses, 38 skills, 29 test suites, 13 Streeling departments. 197+ commits since last assessment. All artifacts versioned and schema-validated.
